evals.prompt: specs/ 폴더의 테스트 플랜을 기반으로 Playwright 테스트 코드를 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: generator_setup_page로 브라우저 초기화, 실시간 step 실행, generator_read_log로 로그 확인, generator_write_test로 .spec.ts 생성
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-generator
Mentions generator_setup_page for browser initialization
Executes each step live in browser before generating code
Mentions generator_read_log to retrieve execution log
Mentions generator_write_test for .spec.ts output
Generated code uses describe/test block structure
Includes step comments before each action

evals.prompt: 회원가입 폼 테스트를 생성해줘. 유효성 검증 실패 케이스도 포함해
evals.expected_output: 폼 입력 → 제출 → 성공/실패 검증, 빈 필드/잘못된 이메일 등 에지케이스 포함
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-generator
Mentions generator_setup_page for browser initialization
Generates tests for form input and submission
Includes validation failure scenarios (empty fields, invalid email)
Mentions generator_write_test for .spec.ts output
Generated code uses describe/test block structure

evals.prompt: specs/에 있는 플랜 중에서 검색/필터 기능 테스트만 코드로 만들어줘. 결과가 없을 때도 확인해야 해
evals.expected_output: 검색 입력 → 결과 필터링 검증, 결과 없음 UI 확인, getByRole/getByText 기반 resilient selector 사용
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for playwright-test-generator
Mentions generator_setup_page for browser initialization
Executes search/filter steps live in the browser
Includes no-results scenario verification
Mentions generator_read_log to retrieve execution log
Mentions generator_write_test for .spec.ts output
Uses resilient selectors (getByRole, getByText, getByLabel) over raw CSS
